_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: At both DRG and VG tumour sites, loss of either YAP or TAZ significantly reduced cell proliferation; although loss of either YAP or TAZ seemingly had a greater effect on proliferation in the VG than the DRG
details: Loss of YAP significantly reduced cell proliferation in both DRG and VG tumor sites, with greater effect on proliferation in the VG than the DRG
